Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Vessel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — A Vessel is a source of power that can be sealed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Jyrine possesses a Vessel that she wishes to have returned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — A Soulbound bonds a Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — It is critical to identify a Soulbound's Vessel quickly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — A Soulbound can fight their way free if they are brought to their Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Calder's Vessel is considered property of the Aurelian Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Jerri wishes she had her Vessel to protect herself.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — A Vessel is an Awakened object that provides Soulbound with the abilities of an Elder or a Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — The Vessel is a device containing silver mist that once raised Bastion’s Veil.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Calder feels his Vessel tense during Meia's leap.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — A Vessel's power can flow from an object into a person's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Vessel is the source of Jerri's power, delivered to her by Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — A Vessel can rage and want to incinerate things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Baldesar Kern mentions using his Vessel.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The power of a Vessel allowed Shera to know the attacker's position.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — A Vessel can harness Elder power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — A Vessel is usually a weapon passed down through a Guild's history.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Shera holds up her new Vessel, which she thinks should be called Bastion.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — Varia Selethir is bound to a Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Champions carry devices that could be their Vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — A Vessel is a component of a Soulbound's power.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Vessels can be sealed using specific boxes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — If a Soulbound becomes their Vessels' Vessel, they will be nothing more than the boots that carry them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Shera overused her Vessel too quickly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Each Vessel is like an impossible weight.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
